decisions.title: Prioritize Canvas documentation completion for Q2 launch
decisions.context: Canvas is a key 2026 product pillar (Embed Deeper). DOC-33 in progress but needs completion timeline to support user adoption and decision capture.

arguments.for: Canvas enables deeper embedding in customer workflows, directly supporting North Star metric. Documentation critical for adoption.
arguments.against: Engineering capacity stretched across multiple initiatives. May need to deprioritize other doc work.

decisions.title: Commit to Files in CEL general availability date
decisions.context: ENG-8700 RFC complete, ENG-10014 instrumentation in progress, ENG-10013 YAML support, ENG-10015 UI attachment ready. Feature aligns with 'Nail the Core' pillar for data handling.

arguments.for: Clear technical progress across multiple workstreams. Files expand decision-making capabilities with richer data context.
arguments.against: Need to validate performance at scale and ensure instrumentation coverage before GA announcement.

decisions.title: Approve GovCloud deployment for DS customer workflows
decisions.context: ENG-9939: Windmill deployment requested for DS customer data workflow management. Government customers represent 'Build the Moat' opportunity.
decisions.blockedBy: Security compliance review and GovCloud certification timeline unclear

arguments.for: Unlocks government/regulated industry customers. Competitive moat through compliance capabilities.
arguments.against: Significant ongoing compliance overhead. May distract from core product development.

decisions.title: Standardize feature flag management approach
decisions.context: ENG-8723 database-backed feature flag tooling + ENG-9122 front-end prototypes + ENG-10058 cleanup work suggests need for unified strategy.

arguments.for: Current feature flag sprawl creates technical debt. Unified approach improves velocity and reduces errors.
arguments.against: Migration effort significant. May slow short-term feature delivery.

decisions.title: Commit to multi-asset simulator capabilities roadmap
decisions.context: ENG-9856 multi-asset support + ENG-7853 family stats minimum runs indicate push toward portfolio-level analysis. Aligns with Explore V2 vision.

arguments.for: Customers increasingly need portfolio-level decisions, not single-asset analysis. Clear differentiator vs competitors.
arguments.against: Complexity increases significantly. UI/UX challenges for presenting multi-asset results clearly.

keyResults.name: Explore V2: Data quality reliability (ad hoc constraints, duplicate handling)
Plot/visualization improvements shipped (log scale, axes controls, family plots)

timeAudit.weekSummary: 30 engineering signals processed across core platform, visualization, and enterprise features. High activity on Files in CEL (4 tickets), plotting improvements (5 tickets), and infrastructure (feature flags, monitoring).
alerts: Canvas documentation (DOC-33) has no clear completion date - blocks Q2 launch messaging
GovCloud deployment (ENG-9939) appears to be moving forward without security decision checkpoint
Feature flag work spread across 3+ initiatives without unified strategy
ABAC policy bug (ENG-10039) could affect enterprise customers - verify priority
